title: sebastiania glandulosa
intro: Sebastiania glandulosa, also known as the 'Candelabra Tree' or 'Glandular Sebastiania', is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sebastiania glandulosa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, Sebastiania glandulosa is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
